text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $66k with minimal movement, while Ethereum outpaces it with a 2.5% gain, suggesting some rotation into altcoins despite extreme fear conditions. The Fear & Greed index at 23 indicates capitulation, yet the 7-day improvement of +13 points and solid $139B daily volume show tentative stabilization rather than panic selling. Bitcoin dominance at 56.5% remains elevated, reflecting typical risk-off positioning when confidence is low.
